what_it_does: Module constitution (prescriptive folder-note) for the ai_tics/ directory: defines what an AI-tic is (a catalogued generic-AI fingerprint to subtract), the file-discovered registry pattern (one self-registering ai_tics/<id>.py per tic), the required AI_TIC dict schema, the live seeded set of tics, and the rules for adding/extending them.
observations: Frontmatter: type constitution, register prescriptive, module ai_tics, governs [P1, M4], status living, typed relates-to links
Defines AI-tic as a declared generic-AI fingerprint matched by the M4 fingerprint pass producing ai-fingerprint marks with direction 'subtract'
States the denoising principle: generic+recurring = subtract; idiosyncratic+recurring = gold
Mandates directory-discovery (file-per-entry) over a python AI_TICS = {...} dict, citing PART 4.3
Schema: module-level AI_TIC dict {id, markers, label, desc}; id MUST equal file stem; markers a non-empty list of non-empty strings; malformed entry fails loud at discovery
Lists 7 live seeded tics: framework_imposition, versioning, false_finality, silent_fallback, agent_arch, closure_form, mvp — each tied to a NAMED Tim frustration
Floor rule: a tic is declared DATA (catalogue entry), reads only via all_markers()/as_records(), never resolve/dispatch
Seam: discovered by runtime/ai_tics.py:AiTicRegistry mirroring ProjectionRegistry/RoleRegistry/NodeRegistry; create_ai_tic authoring flagged as a separate coordinated pass
Acceptance test tests/ai_tics_acceptance.py asserts each live tic is reflected here
standouts: The 7 tics are explicitly seeded from Tim's named frustrations, encoding personal anti-patterns as a machine-checkable catalogue
Denoising-as-subtraction: surfacing meaning by subtracting generic-AI tells, with an explicit 'subtract' mark direction
Registry-is-truth + fail-loud discipline: add-a-file un/registers on rediscover; this doc must be updated or acceptance fails
conventions: Follows the repo's folder-note/constitution schema (frontmatter + Is/Why/Guarantees/Seam/Never/Relates to/Read next)
Mirrors the established file-discovered registry pattern used by roles/skills/projections/node-types
Uses aliased wikilinks and typed relations per vault conventions
notes: If briefing someone: this is the rulebook for the ai_tics registry — a file-per-entry catalogue of generic-AI 'tells' (seeded from Tim's frustrations) that the M4 fingerprint pass subtracts to denoise content.
questions: What is the exact matching algorithm the fingerprint pass uses against markers (substring, token, regex)?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it is a constitution and reads as one, fully describing the module's contract and rules.
apparent_themes: encoding named frustrations as a catalogue
intention_signals: Tries to make 'generic-AI tells' a first-class, extensible, agent-authorable catalogue so the cognition engine can subtract machine-fingerprint noise and surface Tim-meaning, while keeping it pure data discovered from files.
novelty: The concept of an AI-tic as a subtractable fingerprint, and seeding the catalogue directly from a user's named frustrations to invert denoising direction.
contribution: Contributes the definition, schema, live seeded set, and discipline of the AI-tic catalogue and its M4 fingerprint/subtract semantics.
summary_for_embedding: Prescriptive module constitution defining the file-discovered ai_tics registry — catalogued generic-AI fingerprints (AI_TIC dicts with id+markers) the M4 fingerprint pass matches to emit subtract-direction ai-fingerprint marks.
intention_for_embedding: To specify how generic-AI 'tells', seeded from Tim's named frustrations, are catalogued as extensible file-discovered data and subtracted to denoise content and surface meaning.
